title: cynodon nlemfuensis
intro: Cynodon nlemfuensis, also known as buffel grass, is a species of grass native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Cynodon nlemfuensis include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and manage wounds. Cynodon nlemfuensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine in Africa and other regions.
